hero_description: The only Kubernetes-native DBaaS that brings full GitOps maturity to stateful workloads - at Operator Capability Level 5

challenges.title: Spec Override Wars
challenges.description: GitOps tools keep reverting your manual changes because the operator mutates the CR spec.

challenges.title: Lost Hotfixes
challenges.description: Emergency fixes applied with kubectl disappear on next reconciliation.

challenges.title: No Audit Trail
challenges.description: Changes made outside Git violate the single source of truth principle.

reconciliation_conflict.note: Result: Endless fights. Downtime risk. Frustration.

code_demo.title: One Git commit. Zero reconciliation pain.
code_demo.subtitle: KubeDB GitOps Solution
code_demo.code:
apiVersion: gitops.kubedb.com/v1alpha1
kind: PostgresGitOps
metadata:
  name: prod-db
spec:
  version: "16.4"
  replicas: 5
  storage:
    size: "200Gi"
  resources:
    requests:
      cpu: "4"
      memory: "16Gi"
  config: 
    max_connections: 500
  tls:
    enabled: true

steps.title: Commit to Git
steps.description: Push your desired database state using dedicated GitOps CRDs.

steps.title: Argo CD / Flux Syncs
steps.description: Your favorite GitOps tool applies the change safely.

steps.title: OpsRequest Magic
steps.description: KubeDB translates your declaration into safe, auditable OpsRequests: no spec fights.

comparison.title: Avoiding the Classic Operator Reconciliation Conflict
comparison.subtitle: A common pain point with GitOps and most database operators

problem.title: The Spec Override Problem
steps: Declare desired state in Custom Resource spec
GitOps detects drift and attempts to revert
problem.result: Result: Endless reconciliation fights, failed syncs, noisy alerts, and operational instability

solution.title: KubeDB's Solution
solution.result: Result: Clean separation, no spec fights, auditable operations, single source of truth in Git

when_to_use_description: Built from the ground up for declarative infrastructure and conflict-free reconciliation.

when_to_use.title: Declarative Everything
when_to_use.description: Define your entire database infrastructure as code in Git. Every change, from initial provisioning to day-2 operations, is tracked and version-controlled.

when_to_use.title: Conflict-Free Reconciliation
when_to_use.description: Dedicated GitOps CRDs eliminate the classic spec override problem. No more endless reconciliation fights between GitOps tools and operators.

when_to_use.title: OpsRequest Intelligence
when_to_use.description: Long-running operations are safely translated into controlled OpsRequests with validation, sequencing, progress tracking, and rollback support.

when_to_use.title: Production-Grade Safety
when_to_use.description: All changes go through intelligent merging, prerequisite validation, and safe execution paths. No direct mutations of critical database resources.

why_kubedb_title: Why KubeDB Is the Only True GitOps-Ready Kubernetes-Native DBaaS
why_kubedb_note: Most other database operators either lack this level of GitOps maturity or force teams into imperative workarounds for day-2 operations.

why_kubedb_features.title: Broad Database Support
why_kubedb_features.description: Consistent GitOps experience across 25+ databases including PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka, ClickHouse, and more.

why_kubedb_features.title: OpsRequest Abstraction
why_kubedb_features.description: Any change is safely translated into controlled, long-running operations with full auditability and rollback capabilities.

why_kubedb_features.title: Conflict-Free by Design
why_kubedb_features.description: GitOps CRDs eliminate the classic spec override problem that plagues traditional database operators.

why_kubedb_features.title: Production-Grade Features
why_kubedb_features.description: High availability, automated backup/restore via KubeStash, monitoring, TLS, encryption-at-rest, and full Level 5 Auto Pilot behaviors.

why_kubedb_features.title: Native Integration
why_kubedb_features.description: Works seamlessly with Argo CD, Flux, and any CNCF-aligned GitOps tooling without proprietary lock-in.

why_kubedb_features.title: Single Source of Truth
why_kubedb_features.description: Git-declared GitOps resources remain the authoritative source while the operator manages operational complexity behind the scenes.

cta_description: The only Level 5 operator with true GitOps maturity for databases
